memories: User leases a compact car but constantly researches visa requirements for foreign countries.
User is very close with their cousin and often gives them life advice.
User channels competitive nature into weekly video game tournaments with online friends.
User carefully curates Instagram posts to appear effortlessly entertained.
User believes that true understanding of another being comes from complete consumption, seeing it as the ultimate form of intimacy.
User identifies as a closet cannibal.
User watches recordings of local stand-up comedy performances every Monday night, taking notes on timing and delivery.

User dedicates Saturday mornings to selecting vintage babydoll dresses and scuffed combat boots, testing combinations while listening to Bon Iver, documenting each outfit in a private digital collection.
User works as a software developer.
User watches reality television while simultaneously reading true crime books.
User loves sushi and spends Sundays attempting homemade rolls with varying success.
User is learning to play the guitar.
User feeds pet lizard Ragini frozen mice every Tuesday and Friday at 7 PM, insisting on handling this personally to build trust with the reptile.
query: My cousin is moving to Nebraska and feels a bit disconnected. I want to suggest some new outdoor hobbies that could help them form a deep, connection with the local environment and its inhabitants. What are some ideas?
